name: Reuben Soup#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Fry the bacon in a soup kettle until crispy.
3. Add onions and garlic, sauté until tender.
4. Add sauerkraut, chicken stock, mustard, potatoes, caraway seeds, and corned beef.
5. Heat through.
6. Cut bread into 1/2-inch squares, spread on a baking sheet, drizzle with butter, and bake for ten minutes or until crisp through.
7. Ladle soup into bowls, sprinkle with pumpernickel croutons, and top with one teaspoon grated Swiss cheese.
Makes 12 servings.
